---
title: "IAT Participant level analysis: baseline"
author: "Alexander Porshnev"
date: "12/05/2025"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
engine: knitr
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=."]
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# IAT Participant level analysis report on baseline


Notice that you don't need to define chunk options, but you can using
`#+`. just before code e.g. `#+ term=True, caption='Fancy plots.'`.
If you're viewing the published version have a look at the
[source](FIR_design_plots.jl) to see the markup.

```{julia}
	using Pkg
	using CairoMakie        
	using DataFrames
	using MixedModels
	using MixedModelsMakie # diagnostic plots
	using RCall            # call R from Julia
	using Arrow
	using StandardizedPredictors
	using BoxCox
	using LinearAlgebra
	using StatsAPI
	using StatsBase
	using CSV
	using PrettyTables
```

```{r}
print("Hello")
```


## Upload Dataset

```{julia}

iat = DataFrame(Arrow.Table("out_step_02/t_2009_top10.arrow"))

function OutModel(m_prec, m_next)
	print(m_next, "\n")
	print(MixedModels.likelihoodratiotest(m_prec, m_next), "\n")
    return 1
end

print("Hello Julia")
```

#```{julia}
m00 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + sex + countryres 
        + Length + NSyll  
	    + Order
        + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

print("## m00", m00, "/n")

m01 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll
      + Order + change
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

OutModel(m00, m01)

m02a = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number 
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

m02 = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number 
	  + after_error 
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
 
m02bnc = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logBNC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02bnc)


m02ukwac = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logUKWAC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02ukwac)

m02bbc = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = @formula(
    RT ~
      1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
      + Length + NSyll 
      + change + Order 
      + trial_number + after_error 
	  + logBBC
      + (1 | subj)  + (1|trial_name)
      )
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
OutModel(m02, m02bbc)
```
=#
#=```{julia}

modelBICs = DataFrame([ (model="m00: ASCLNsO ", bic=bic(m00),delta = "-"),
						(model="m01: m00+change", bic=bic(m01),delta =bic(m00)-bic(m01)),
						(model="m02a: m01+trial_number", bic=bic(m02a),delta =bic(m01)-bic(m02a)),
						(model="m02:m02a+after_error", bic=bic(m02),delta =bic(m02a)-bic(m02)),
						(model="m02+logBNC", bic=bic(m02bnc),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02bnc)),
						(model="m02+logUKWAC", bic=bic(m02ukwac),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02ukwac)),
						(model="m02+logBBC", bic=bic(m02bbc),delta =bic(m02)-bic(m02bbc))
#=, 
	   	(model="m1_ukwac", bic=bic(m1_ukwac)),
		  	(model="m1_bnc", bic=bic(m1_bnc)),
		  	(model="m1_bbc", bic=bic(m1_bbc)),
			(model="m1_bnc", bic=bic(m1_bnc)),
			(model="m2", bic=bic(m2)),
			(model="m3", bic=bic(m3))
=#
])
print(modelBICs)
pretty_table(modelBICs)
```
=#
